name: Vigil — Postop & Postpartum Sentinel
description: Continuously monitors postoperative and postpartum patients for deterioration. Runs MEWT, qSOFA, and CDC ASE screens against FHIR vitals and labs. Drafts SBAR escalation notes for clinician review.

extensions.description: FHIR context allowing the agent to query a FHIR server securely. Vigil reads the context from A2A message metadata under any key containing the substring 'fhir-context' and translates {fhirUrl, fhirToken, patientId} into the three SHARP HTTP headers (x-fhir-server-url, x-fhir-access-token, x-patient-id) when calling its MCP tools.

skills.name: Screen vitals for early-warning thresholds
skills.description: Runs MEWT against the patient's most recent vitals. Returns triggered/not, breach list with severity, narrative summary.

skills.name: Score deterioration risk
skills.description: Computes qSOFA and a composite deterioration band (low/moderate/high). Returns score, rationale, and contributing signals.

skills.name: Check for sepsis onset
skills.description: Applies CDC Adult Sepsis Event criteria (SIRS + infection + organ dysfunction). Returns suspicion verdict with cited evidence.

skills.name: Draft SBAR escalation note
skills.description: Combines all three screens with the LLM-drafted Situation/Background/Assessment/Recommendation handoff. Returns the prose for clinician review.

skills.name: Start autonomous watching
skills.description: Begins background monitoring for the named patient. Optional. Demo-only.

skills.name: Assess postoperative AKI (KDIGO-staged)
skills.description: Stages acute kidney injury (KDIGO 0–3) from serial creatinine + 24h urine output. Imputes baseline creatinine as the lowest value in the past 7 days when none is supplied (KDIGO 2012 §3.1.2) and surfaces the imputation explicitly. Returns time-to-intervention recommendation per SCCM 2017 (Joannidis et al, Intensive Care Med 2017;43:730).

skills.name: Score NEWS2 (RCP 2017)
skills.description: Computes the National Early Warning Score 2 (Royal College of Physicians 2017) — a second-opinion deterioration score alongside qSOFA. Returns aggregate 0–20, band {low, low-medium, medium, high}, red-flag boolean (any single parameter scoring 3), and per-parameter contributions.

skills.name: Assess postpartum hemorrhage severity (CMQCC)
skills.description: Stages postpartum hemorrhage 0–3 per CMQCC OB Hemorrhage Toolkit v3.0 with ACOG Practice Bulletin 183 (2017) cumulative-EBL definition. Inputs: cumulative EBL (LOINC 55758-7), HR, SBP, fibrinogen, hemoglobin trend. Returns stage, shock index (HR/SBP), triggers list, and the verbatim CMQCC uterotonic-and-action ladder. When EBL is unmeasured, degrades to shock-index-only with explicit ACOG CO 794 caveat.

skills.name: Flag drug-vs-physiology treatment conflicts
skills.description: Physiology-aware safety scanner: flags drug-vs-vitals/labs/conditions conflicts (NSAID/AKI, β-blocker/bradycardia, ACE-I/hyperkalemia, opioid/respiratory depression, anticoagulant/bleeding). Cites guideline per rule; deterministic verdict, LLM only for prose.

skills.name: List recent autonomous-loop alerts
skills.description: Reads Vigil's review queue — alerts surfaced by the autonomous monitoring loop ticking against the seeded postop cohort. Returns alerts grouped by severity (critical/urgent/routine), with patient id, narrative, and timestamp. Independent of the patient currently scoped in PO chat — use this for ward-wide situational awareness, screen_vitals/score_risk for the chat-scoped patient.

skills.name: Run autonomous monitoring cycle now
skills.description: Runs one autonomous-loop cycle synchronously across every patient in Vigil's HAPI cohort, instead of waiting up to POLL_INTERVAL_SEC for the next scheduled tick. Returns a summary of patients screened and alerts enqueued. Useful in demos and on-demand re-checks — a follow-up `list_recent_alerts` reflects the new state immediately.

apiKeySecurityScheme.name: X-API-Key
apiKeySecurityScheme.description: API key required to access this agent.
